reasoning: The control AU-14-b focuses on session auditing, which in Kubernetes can be mapped to audit logging capabilities. Kubernetes Audit Logs can track API server requests, which is equivalent to auditing sessions. Ensuring audit logging is enabled and properly configured aligns with the control's requirements. Additionally, monitoring changes to NetworkPolicies can be considered part of session auditing as it relates to tracking network access changes.
